author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Delivered: accumulate_grad now keeps gradients on their original device. First gradient stores a detached copy via into_storage_and_shape (no CPU round-trip for GPU tensors). Accumulation uses backend.add_f32() when both existing and incoming grads are on GPU (f32). CPU fallback preserved for f64 and mixed-device cases, with on_device() to restore the original device after CPU accumulation. 837 tests pass.
